Name: Number of times 'Accepted + Wait' appears in variants whose total performance exceeds 900,000
Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' that are directly followed by another 'Accepted + Wait' (e.g., consecutive waits)
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait' in cases that eventually reach 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Closed' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' relative to the combined frequency of all wait-type activities ('Accepted + Wait - User', 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation', 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor', 'Accepted + Wait - Customer')
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Number of process variants where 'Accepted + Wait' immediately precedes 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Resolved' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases containing 'Accepted + Wait' that originate from the VINST incident management system with impact level 'Medium' or 'High'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + Wait' occurring between two 'Accepted + In Progress' activities
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + Wait' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' events that belong to cases also containing 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Ratio of variants containing 'Accepted + Wait' to variants containing 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + Wait' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
